title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, embed, generate with any model served by Ollama.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same generate/chat API as Python.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLM or chat endpoints in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model manager, RAG, multi-user); drop-in replacement for ChatGPT UI.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; sync/async APIs, streaming, embeddings, list/pull models.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Lightweight RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma/Qdrant + Streamlit.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive TUI for Ollama powered by Textual; chat, manage models, syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that chats, generates images (via SD), and pulls models through Ollama.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-nvidia
summary: Official guide and helper scripts for running Ollama on NVIDIA GPUs (Docker runtime, CUDA layers).

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing typed async client for Ollama’s HTTP API.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app + REST API wrapper around Ollama; includes admin UI and chat widget.

title: ollama-github-actions
summary: GitHub Action to spin up Ollama service in CI for testing LLM-dependent code.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot that uses Ollama for on-prem LLM chat; supports threads and private channels.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Minimal Streamlit chat app that talks to Ollama; one-file deploy with Docker.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async streaming, embeddings, and model management.

title: reddit/r/ollama
summary: Active subreddit for Ollama ecosystem news, model benchmarks, and troubleshooting.

title: hacker news discussion
summary: Thread comparing Ollama vs. llama.cpp performance and GPU memory usage.
